goal: Repoint hooks.py to namespace-local serving modules instead of the legacy top-level serving aliases.
constraints: Preserve hook behavior and output shape
Do not remove top-level compatibility aliases in this tranche
behavioral_changes: hooks.py now imports serving helpers from the intelligence_serving namespace directly.
Top-level serving modules remain in place as compatibility aliases for external callers.
Hook behavior is unchanged; only internal import direction is tightened.
follow_up: The next dependency-cleanup passes should target other internal callers still using top-level compatibility aliases.
Do not remove the top-level aliases until the codebase no longer depends on them internally.
